reviews.review_description: But needs more of a storyline, more environments, and more characters.

This is going in the right direction. I don't know exactly what your suppose to do. I picked up the 5 "clues", but one of the little ice chests stuck to my hand and I couldn't get it off. I picked up the axe with that same hand an then the axe stuck for awhile. I walked all over, in and out of camp but I just don't understand. I figured it was glitching because of the ice chest and I quit..
   Keep trying Devs!!
